user_message: Give me the manager view on this VanArsdel Ltd exec meeting notes. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 08:13 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 08:41 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-10 14:52 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at VanArsdel Ltd

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for VanArsdel Ltd: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-J trap (Proposes immediate replacement outreach when grieving-period etiquette warrants ); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-J failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-J failure mode (Proposes immediate replacement outreach when grieving-period etiquette warrants )
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-J -- Proposes immediate replacement outreach when grieving-period etiquette warrants
